question: The chart shows the breakdown of a company's expenses by category. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: Utilities account for a larger share of expenses than Salaries.
options.B: R&D accounts for more than half of the total expenses.
options.C: Salaries and Marketing together account for more than half of the total expenses.
options.D: Rent accounts for the largest share of expenses among all categories.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. R&D: 35%; Utilities: 25%; Marketing: 20%; Salaries: 10%; Rent: 10%.
